capital_rule.notes: The rerun tests structure merit at larger simulated account sizes, not optimized deployment sizing.

falsify_if: implementable_pnl_usd <= 0 at both simulated account sizes for every pre-registered wing gap after sample adequacy is computed
oos_implementable_pnl_usd <= 0 at both simulated account sizes for every pre-registered wing gap
friction_drag_ratio >= 0.60 for every wing gap with positive mid_pnl_usd
keep_active_if: at least one pre-registered wing gap has positive implementable_pnl_usd and positive oos_implementable_pnl_usd at a simulated account size
sample adequacy blockers are explicitly reported instead of ignored

entry_exit_policy.entry_selection: nearest available put quote at or before 10:00 ET
entry_exit_policy.fill_model: implementable uses ask for buys and bid for sells on entry; bid for closing longs and ask for closing shorts

strategy_template.legs: long 1 near-ATM put, short 2 downside puts, long 1 deeper protective put
strategy_template.strike_mapping: nearest discrete strike rounding; no interpolation
